2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

896 TLPL - Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership

TLPL770 Black and Latino Education: History and Policy (3 Credits) Examination of the historical legacies and contemporary policies

that have contributed to the educational status (K-20) of Blacks and Latinos in the United States from the 19th century to the present. Issues surrounding language, immigration, racism, social class, and state and federal policies will also be analyzed.

Recommended: EDCI776; and completion of EDSP611 recommended. Credit Only Granted for: EDCI786 or TLPL770.
